task_completion.description: Verify the solution (.sln) and project (.csproj) files have been renamed to the target name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Solution Explorer or File Explorer shows the solution node and project node/files are named 'Acme.InventoryAPI'.

task_completion.description: Verify the underlying filesystem folders have been renamed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File Explorer, folder view, or file path tooltips in Visual Studio show the directory containing the project is now named 'Acme.InventoryAPI' instead of 'Acme.Template'.

task_completion.description: Verify the project's Assembly name has been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Visual Studio Project Properties window (Application tab) shows 'Assembly name' set to 'Acme.InventoryAPI', or the .csproj file shows <AssemblyName>Acme.InventoryAPI</AssemblyName>.

task_completion.description: Verify the project's Default namespace has been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Visual Studio Project Properties window (Application tab) shows 'Default namespace' set to 'Acme.InventoryAPI', or the .csproj file shows <RootNamespace>Acme.InventoryAPI</RootNamespace>.

task_completion.description: Verify the code namespaces have been refactored to the new name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Open .cs code files in the Visual Studio editor display 'namespace Acme.InventoryAPI' (or file-scoped 'namespace Acme.InventoryAPI;').

task_completion.description: Verify the solution builds successfully after all renaming operations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Visual Studio Output window or status bar displays a successful build message (e.g., 'Build: 1 succeeded', 'Build succeeded') with no errors.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Visual Studio 2022 IDE to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Visual Studio 2022 interface being actively used, rather than relying solely on terminal commands or a basic text editor like Notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the project properties were genuinely modified in the project system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Modifications to the Assembly name and Default namespace should be visible in the actual Visual Studio Properties GUI or a valid XML view of the .csproj file, not in a disconnected text file.

integrity.description: Verify the build success message is authentic.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Output window should show standard MSBuild/Visual Studio build logs for 'Acme.InventoryAPI', proving a real compilation occurred rather than manually typed text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original project name is 'Acme.Template'. The target name for the solution, project, folders, files, Assembly name, Default namespace, and code namespaces is exactly 'Acme.InventoryAPI'.
